OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing, either a MIME type or Stix Object (for information only).

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: Should always be set to EXTERNAL_IMPORT for this connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: Duration between two scheduled runs of the connector (ISO 8601 format).

CONNECTOR_PULL_HISTORY.description: Whether to pull historic data. It is not recommended to set it to ``true`` as there will be a large influx of data.

CONNECTOR_HISTORY_START_YEAR.description: Year (or ``YYYYMM``) to start the historical backfill from. Accepts the four-digit year shape (``2023``) — backfill begins on January 1st of that year — or the six-digit year-month shape (``202306``) — backfill begins on the first of that month. The ransomware.live feed only goes back to 2020; values older than 2020 are clamped to ``2020-01`` at runtime.

CONNECTOR_CREATE_THREAT_ACTOR.description: Whether to create a Threat Actor object.

CONNECTOR_CREATE_INTRUSION_SET.description: Whether to create an Intrusion Set object.

CONNECTOR_CREATE_CAMPAIGN.description: Whether to create a Campaign object.

CONNECTOR_CREATE_REPORT.description: Whether to create a Report object.

CONNECTOR_MARKING_VALUE.description: TLP marking attached to every emitted STIX object. ``TLP:CLEAR`` (default) is the OpenCTI-specific modern label; ``TLP:WHITE`` is the legacy STIX 2.1 equivalent.

CONNECTOR_CREATE_LEAK_SITE_DOMAINS.description: Whether to create DomainName observables for ransomware group leak sites and link them to the IntrusionSet

CONNECTOR_CREATE_LEAK_POST_REFS.description: Whether to include the leak post URL as an external reference on victim reports
